paragraphs: I'm Sofi, a Computer Science student (UBA) focusing on [strong]data analysis[/strong]. I'm driven by curiosity, clear design, and collaboration. I ensure every delivery connects with real people and adds measurable value.

experience.title: What I'm doing and what I've done

case.title: PIKI · Mail Tracking & Logistics
case.subtitle: Intelligent logistics query management — Group 6 Capstone Project
case.problem: Logistics operations were [strong]fragmented and slow[/strong], leading to a heavy operational burden on customer support due to constant shipping-related inquiries.
results: Reduced operational workload for the support team
Clear and immediate visibility of shipment statuses
Faster, more efficient, and scalable responses

bullets: Intensive practice in data cleaning, modeling, and presentation.
KPIs and dashboard focused on decision-making.
